title: Make Todo List App floating so one list can be used across all workspaces.
excerpt: The Todo list app is great however it would be amazing if there was an option to have a version that operated similarly to sticky notes.  Its always open and you can create a general to do list as you go about your day.

posts.author: JCross (John Cross)
posts.cookedHtml: The Todo list app is great however it would be amazing if there was an option to have a version that operated similarly to sticky notes. Its always open and you can create a general to do list as you go about your day.

posts.author: Mindflows_MK (MK Escabarte)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi John, MK here from Mindflows. Love this suggestion! A sticky notes-style version that stays open sounds like a great idea.

In the meantime, you can try using the Notes Widget on your dashboard or keep a simple text widget open for quick notes.
